description: Response body for GET /v1/fix/commands. Lists all API-visible registered atomic actions with their metadata from the ActionRegistry. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class FixCommandListResponse.

count.description: Total number of commands in the response. Equals len(commands).

commands.description: List of ActionCommandItem entries (contracts.action_command_item), one per API-visible registered action.
